title: ebelingia abyssinica
intro: Ebelingia abyssinica is a plant species native to Ethiopia, belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Ebelingia abyssinica can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as a dried extract, to utilize its medicinal properties.
